response.justification: Bogdan brings strong technical leadership, TypeScript expertise, and current exposure to AI-agent infrastructure at Naver, but falls short of the core requirement for 8+ years shipping production-grade AI solutions. Python is notably absent from his skill set despite being one of the two primary languages. His AI work appears limited to the past 1-2 years and lacks evidence of vector databases, RAG architectures, or full-stack AI system design. He could interview if your team values rapid ramp-up and technical breadth over deep AI specialization, but he doesn't meet the baseline experience requirement.
strengths: Strong technical seniority with 20 years experience and current Staff Software Engineer role; demonstrates leadership through mentoring, workshops, and team contributions
Direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow frameworks at Naver (current role), plus TypeScript expertise across multiple roles
Proven ability to build and optimize high-performance, scalable systems (AWS CDK, data integration at Dunnhumby handling millions of requests/second)
concerns: Python is absent from resume despite being one of the two explicitly required languages; primary language experience is TypeScript and legacy languages (D, C++, Java)
No documented experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or data pipelines for structured/unstructured data required for AI systems
AI work is recent (less than 2 years) and vaguely described as 'contributing to AI-agent infrastructure'; no evidence of designing/shipping production-grade AI solutions over the required 8+ years

key_factors.factor: Insufficient documented AI/GenAI systems shipping experience
Current emerging AI work with TypeScript and leadership at Staff level
